checks.expectation: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/config/search/search-settings -- verify the form renders with fields for similarity_threshold (showing 0.7), result_limit (showing 5), and cache_ttl (showing 300) with correct default values (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: Authenticated successfully via drush uli. Navigated to /admin/config/search/search-settings. Verified form renders with all three required fields as spinbuttons: similarity_threshold with value 0.7, result_limit with value 5, cache_ttl with value 300. Page title: 'Search Settings | Drush Site-Install', HTTP 200. All expected default values confirmed via JavaScript eval.
